meta.title: Core Control Unit | Engineering & Digital Solutions
meta.description: Core Control Unit is a French software engineering company specialising in system architecture and custom digital solutions.

hud.label: SYSTEM // LIVE DEMO
lines: This scene runs live in your browser via WebGPU.
Every blade of grass is GPU-instanced in real time.
This black hole is shaded procedurally, no textures.
We build sites like this one, tuned to your product.
From a landing page to a full 3D showcase, same team.
No video, no render, this is happening right now.

hero.taglineSub: We build the websites, apps, and custom software your business runs on, from the first line of code to launch.

services.heading: Services
services.subtitle: From websites and custom software to bots, apps, and more. We build it, launch it, and get your brand noticed.

items.title: Websites & Web Apps
items.description: Websites and web apps for people and businesses. We hand over all the code, or take care of hosting for you, whichever suits you best.

items.title: Billboard Advertising
items.description: Physical advertising across all 50 US states through a private contact with a network of 3,200 billboard spots, including giant formats. Nationwide reach, the right locations, hard to miss.

items.title: Bots, Games & Desktop Apps
items.description: Discord and Telegram bots, small-scale 2D and 3D video games for the web and for Windows/Linux built with SDL or Electron paired with three.js and drei, plus general-purpose desktop GUI software. If it can be built, we'll build it.

items.title: Procedural Book Generation
items.description: Software that procedurally generates ready-to-publish content, puzzle books, classic-style novels, sized and formatted for the Amazon Kindle format. Point it at a genre or puzzle type and it does the rest.

items.title: Smart Contract Development
items.description: Custom blockchain smart contracts, tokens, NFTs & more, built securely from the ground up.

items.title: AI Security Audits
items.description: We run our own AI auditing model to automatically flag vulnerabilities in Solidity smart contracts, surfacing issues a manual review might miss.

items.title: Flash-Loan Arbitrage Bots
items.description: Blockchain flash-loan arbitrage bots we design and run ourselves on Polygon and BNB Smart Chain for now, hunting DeFi price gaps in real time. Not a service we sell, just something we build and experiment with in-house.

values.label: Reliability
values.desc: Built to last, not just to demo.

about.heading: About
about.p1: Core Control Unit is a small, independent software company, not a faceless corporation. We build websites, apps, and custom software from the ground up, with blockchain expertise on hand whenever a project calls for it.
about.p2: We work directly with individuals, startups, and small businesses. No middlemen, no bloat, just clear communication, quick turnaround, and work you fully own.
about.p3: We work remotely with clients around the world and handle each project end to end, from the first line of code to launch.

contact.heading: Start a project
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your project. We reply within 48 hours.
contact.placeholderProject: Describe your project, your current stack, your constraints...

projects.heading: Recent projects
projects.detailSubtitle: A closer look at what we're building, end to end.
projects.buyOnAmazonIt: Buy the Italian edition on Amazon.it

items.title: Seculars Online
items.description: A browser strategy prototype built around a persistent world map. One chunk is currently implemented, with the potential to expand the world infinitely. Control the camera and move with ZQSD or the arrow keys on desktop, or play on mobile.
items.longDescription: Seculars Online is a browser strategy prototype built around a persistent world map. One playable chunk is currently implemented, while the world architecture is designed to support infinite expansion over time. Explore the map with camera controls, use ZQSD or the arrow keys to move on desktop, or play directly on mobile with touch controls.

items.title: Atmosphère
items.description: A desktop controller app built for a private client's Discord music bot, Atmosphère. Manage playback, playlists and bot status from one dashboard, no browser needed, with a local playback mode to preview tracks without sending audio to the bot's voice channel. Delivered as a private commission, not publicly accessible.
items.longDescription: Atmosphère is an Electron and React desktop app built for a private client to run their Discord music bot without touching Discord itself. It talks to a discord.js and @discordjs/voice backend over a typed IPC bridge, streaming audio through a yt-dlp and ffmpeg pipeline. The dashboard shows live bot status and connection state, a playlist manager organizes and recategorizes tracks, and a self-check routine verifies ffmpeg, the bot token and the folder structure on every launch, healing what it can automatically. A recently added local playback mode locks playback to the app itself, so tracks can be previewed and queued without streaming audio into the bot's Discord voice channel. As this was built as a private commission, the source and a live instance remain the customer's property and are not publicly shared.

items.title: Equilibrium
items.description: Our in-house arbitrage bot, live on BNB Smart Chain. It buys where an asset is cheap and sells where it costs more, automatically.
items.longDescription: Equilibrium is our own trading bot, running live on BNB Smart Chain. Arbitrage simply means buying where something is cheap and selling where it is more expensive, and on decentralized exchanges those small price gaps open and close within seconds. The bot watches several markets at once, around the clock, through multiple independent connections, so a dropped connection never leaves it blind. When a profitable gap appears, a flash loan provides the funds inside a single transaction and is repaid in that same transaction, so no large capital reserve is needed. A frontrunning mode, limited to 180 minutes per day, can also trade ahead of a pending transaction it has detected. The console below is its live monitoring terminal. Built and run entirely in-house, it is not for sale. Through a privately deployed smart contract, a flash loan can borrow up to $10M in crypto assets, with no investment required beyond very low gas fees.

items.title: Mots Cachés
items.description: Two large-print word-search puzzle books from our procedural generator: Mots Cachés in French, themed around vintage cars, and Parole Intrecciate in Italian, dedicated to memories of Italy in the 1950s, 60s and 70s. 120 puzzles each, 960+ words to find, extra-large print, solutions included.
items.longDescription: Mots Cachés is a word-search puzzle book series built with our own procedural puzzle book generator, published under the Les Grands Jeux d'Antan collection for adults and seniors who enjoy searching, observing and taking their time. The French volume is themed around automobiles and vintage cars, with 120 grids, over 960 words to find across two grid variants, extra-large lettering for comfortable reading, and a full answer index at the end. The Italian volume, Parole Intrecciate, evokes everyday Italy of the 1950s, 60s and 70s: school, radio and songs, television and variety shows, the Vespa and engines, the sea, holidays and daily life at home, one large-print grid per page in a clear black-and-white layout, with complete solutions in the second part of the book. The French edition is available as a fixed-layout Kindle ebook and as a paperback on Amazon.fr, the Italian edition is available in print on Amazon.it. The generator behind them can produce virtually unlimited volumes on demand, each with its own theme, word list, and cover, these books are just one example of what it can output.
